allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
